summary: Maeda has pivoted from a prolonged bearish stance to explicitly calling a market bottom in his most recent video.
narrative: After spending months shorting Ethereum for significant profits, his latest analysis argues that the correction is over and the market is bottoming. He suggests that new leverage mechanisms and flawed 4-year cycle theories support his thesis for higher Bitcoin prices moving forward.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
